choose_language_desc: Filifili lou gagana e fiafia i ai
tagline: Faaaogaina le tamaoaiga e lei lava ona maua
verify_email_desc: Tuuina atu le numera 6-fuainumera na auina atu i le
otp_sent: Ua aʻe le OTP ma le manuia
forgot_password_desc: Tuuina atu lau tuatusi imeli ma matou te auina atu se numera faamaonia e toe setiina ai lau upu faalilolilo.
reset_password_desc: Faatu se upu faalilolilo fou mo lau teugatā.
enter_new_password: Tuuina atu lau upu faalilolilo fou
password_reset_success: Ua toe setiina le upu faalilolilo ma le manuia!
network_error: Mea sese o le fesootaiga. Faamolemole siaki lau fesootaiga.
something_went_wrong: Sa tupu se mea sese. Faamolemole toe taumafai.
profile_updated: Ua faaleleia faʻamatalaga ma le manuia.
invalid_email: Faamolemole tuuina atu se tuatusi imeli aoga
login_tagline:
Siaki lou lagona ma toe fesoʻotaʻi
ma lou nuʻu
welcome_tagline:
Siaki lou lagona ma fesoʻotaʻi
ma tagata e tutusa manatunatuga
your_posts_appear_here: O au tusitusiga o le a faʻaalia iinei
no_saved_posts: E leai ni tusitusiga na sefe
saved_posts_appear_here: Tusitusiga e te sefe o le a faʻaalia iinei
max_interests_allowed: E sili ona tele 10 mea e fiafia i ai
could_not_load_feed: E le mafai ona faʻapipiʻi le feed
be_first_to_share: Ia muamua oe e faʻasoa se mea
permission_media_photos: Faamolemole faʻataga le avanoa i au ata i Faatulagaga.
permission_media_videos: Faamolemole faʻataga le avanoa i au vitiō i Faatulagaga.
max_media_allowed: E sili ona tele {count} faila o ala faʻasalalau
video_compression_failed: Ua le manuia le faʻaitiitia o le vitiō
post_updated: Ua faaleleia le tusitusiga ma le manuia!
link_copied: Ua kopi le soʻotaga i le clipboard
no_following_yet: E leai ni tagata o loo mulimuli atu
mood_camera_subtitle: Tuʻu lou foliga e taʻu le tala
mood_camera_desc: E faʻaaogaina e ENOM lou meapueata i luma e iloilo ai foliga ma iloa ai lou lagona o le taimi nei. O faamatalaga o lou foliga e faʻagaioia i luga o le masini ae le teuina pe faʻasoa.
mood_camera_privacy: E taua lou lē faalauaiteleina — o gaioiga uma e faia i luga o lou masini.
mood_camera_denied_title: E Manaʻomia le Avanoa i le Meapueata
mood_camera_denied_desc: Ina ia iloa lou lagona, e manaʻomia e ENOM le avanoa i le meapueata. Kiliki i lalo e toe taumafai.
mood_camera_perm_denied_desc: Ua faʻatumauga teena le avanoa i le meapueata. Faamolemole faʻaagaina i faatulagaga o lou masini e faʻaaoga ai le iloilo lagona.
mood_camera_restricted_desc: Ua faʻatapulaʻaina le avanoa i le meapueata i lenei masini, atonu ona o le puleaina e matua. Faamolemole siaki faatulagaga o lou masini.
mood_scan_guide: Tuʻu lou foliga i le liʻo
mood_scan_low_light: Ua iloa le malamalama vaivai — taumafai e faʻaagaina le moli
mood_scan_error: E le mafai ona iloa le lagona. Faamolemole toe taumafai.
mood_scan_no_face: E leai se foliga na iloa. Faamolemole faʻaogatotonu lou foliga.
mood_msg_happy: O loo e faʻasalalauina le malosi lelei! Ia faaauau pea ona faʻasoa na lagona lelei.
mood_msg_calm: O loo e i ai i se tulaga filemu o le mafaufau. O se taimi lelei mo le mafaufau.
mood_msg_sad: E lelei lava le lagona faapena. Avatu se taimi mo le tausia o oe lava.
mood_msg_angry: Manava loloto. Mafaufau i se savali puupuu pe meditation.
mood_msg_surprised: Ua maua lou faʻalogo! Ia tumau pea le fiailoa.
mood_msg_neutral: O loo e i ai i se tulaga paleni. O le mafaufau filemu o le mafaufau manino.
mood_msg_default: Siaki lou foliga e iloa ai lou lagona o le taimi nei.
